description_long: This is a cylindrical bottle of CBD Rash, Itch & Burn Relief Ointment from Complete Hemp, featuring a tall, slender form with a smooth, semi-glossy gray cap. The main body is wrapped in a white label adorned with a geometric hexagonal pattern and detailed product information, including branding and usage instructions. The front of the bottle prominently displays the product name and CBD content in bold, clear text. The back and sides of the label provide additional information such as ingredients, directions, and regulatory details in smaller print. The cap appears to be made of plastic and is likely removable, revealing a dispenser underneath. The overall design is clean and modern, with a focus on clarity and functionality.
description: A tall, cylindrical bottle of Complete Hemp CBD ointment with a smooth gray cap and a white label featuring geometric patterns and detailed text.
description_view_0: Front view showing the Complete Hemp branding, product name, and CBD content clearly on the white label.
description_view_1: Back view displaying detailed product information, directions, and ingredients in small print.
description_view_2: Angled rear view highlighting the geometric hexagonal pattern and additional regulatory details.
description_view_3: Side view showing the transition between the patterned and text sections of the label, with barcode and minor details visible.
attribute_product_name: RASH, ITCH & BURN RELIEF OINTMENT CBD
